description_long: This bird features a streamlined body with predominantly olive-green plumage, accented by vibrant blue patches on the head, cheeks, and lower wings. The tail is long and slender, with hints of yellow and dark gray visible on the outer feathers. The beak is short, slightly curved, and pale in color, typical of seed-eating parrots. The wings are compact and closely held to the body, while the legs are short and mostly hidden beneath the feathers. Subtle gradations of color and a smooth feather texture give the bird a lifelike appearance, with no prominent markings except for the blue and green contrast.
description: A slender, olive-green bird with striking blue patches on its head and wings, and a long, narrow tail with yellow highlights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue head, olive-green body, and long, layered tail feathers.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the tapered tail and the uniform green coloration along the back.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with blue on the face and chest, and a clear view of the yellow under-tail feathers.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizing the blue crown, green back, and the symmetry of the tail feathers.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid olive-green with blue patches on head and wings, subtle yellow on tail
